title: ムテキなモーニングルーティン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki, the martial arts Umamusume,
starts her mornings bright and early at 5 a.m.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Master. Good morning, Adept.
Good morning, family. I'm going to continue
working hard today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She begins each day with a respectful greeting
offered in the direction of her family's home,
illuminated by the early morning sun.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Right, now for the next step of the routine... Time
to begin recording.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Today, as part of my report, I'll be recording a
glimpse into my daily life.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I begin by doing my laundry in the dorm washing
machine. This way, it's all done by the time I've
finished my morning routine.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Although the dorm staff offer a comprehensive laundry service... I fear it's too convenient.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've learned the importance of learning how to be
independent, so when I have the time, I wash my
clothes by hand with a scrubbing board.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep... Splish, splash...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That said, on days when I need to focus on my
running, I make use of the washing machine, like
so.
I'm counting on you, washing machine! Osu!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Next, I'll be introducing my pre-run nutritional
intake.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I use a dollop of miso paste to make miso soup.
That said, all I am really doing is dissolving it in
some hot water.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwisssh... Clink, clink, clink.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My grandmother regularly sends me miso from the
dojo. I've been having it in the mornings ever
since I was young.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And it's ready.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hot! Hot, hot! ...But it does hit the spot. I drink a
cup every morning without fail to hydrate my
body and replenish my minerals.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Huff. I tend to run the same route every day.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The reason for this is that if I run here at around
this time—ah, here it comes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrooooom...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The newspaper delivery scooter always comes
down this road around now, and it makes for
perfect racing competition.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I must bear road safety in mind when
running... Hup!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Hehe, it appears the scooter's engine is running particularly well today!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That said, just because I'm training doesn't mean
I'll suffer defeat!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, in the commotion, I dropped my
voice recorder, then stepped on it and smashed it
to pieces...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was overly focused on my efforts to convey even
a small fraction of my passion for running... My
lack of discipline is entirely to blame.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, Yaeno Muteki has broken the voice
recorder she borrowed for a magazine feature.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll apologize to the magazine myself... but how
can I help Yaeno Muteki who, after trying so hard
to make a good impression, failed?
choice_data_list:
Let's redouble our efforts to make up for the
mishap!
Let's focus on writing everything down instead!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So you're suggesting that I unleash all my energy
on the day of the upcoming interview, and seize
that as an opportunity to discuss my routine once
again?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Yes, you're right. It's no use crying
over spilled milk... I must express my remorse
through my actions.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Now that I have come to a decision, I believe I'll
give my current morning routine some deeper
consideration.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There's meaning in every aspect of it... During the
interview, I must be ready to respond promptly
and accurately to any questions!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's resolve is reassuring. I'm pretty
sure her interview's going to go great!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh... That's a brilliant idea!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This is all for a magazine article, so it might be
best to eliminate the need for any transcription.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me! I'll create a complete log that
meticulously details every area of my daily
routine!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And as there's no page limit, I'll write as much as I
possibly can to compensate for my blunder!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Yaeno Muteki sets out drafting an
exhaustive report spanning hundreds of pages of
detailed notes. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's only after she completes her report that I
realize we could have just recorded her speaking
using a phone in place of the voice recorder...
